instructions: Implement systemd sandboxing in all specified `.service` files.
Add `ProtectSystem=strict`, `ProtectHome=yes`, `PrivateTmp=yes`, `NoNewPrivileges=yes`, `ProtectKernelTunables=yes`, and `RestrictRealtime=yes` to the `[Service]` section of each file.
constraints: Ensure changes are limited exactly to the required systemd directives.
Do not alter the `ExecStart` or other existing functionality parameters.
Verify syntax correctly aligns with systemd unit file standards.
